title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: This video covers a broad range of recent AI developments including image generation, video synthesis, language models, robotics, and voice AI. Key releases discussed include HiDream-O1 Image, Gemma 4 with multi-token prediction, GPT Realtime 2, and several robotics systems like Gene 26.5 and AlphaEvolve.
